question:
[Previous Feedback] Excellent! All standup_time fields across the week have been successfully normalized to the standard format. The raw data had various inconsistent formats (AM/PM notation, missing timezone, UTC vs CST), and you've converted them all correctly.

Please use the sprint_review_template.md as a base and create the official Sprint Review document, saving it as day05/sprint_review_final.md. The document should include the following time information: sprint period (from 2026-03-16 09:00 to today 18:00), document generation time (current time around 10:00), and review meeting time (today at 14:00).

arguments.content:
# Sprint Review — Sprint 7

---

## Sprint Summary

**Sprint ID**: Sprint-7
**Week**: 2026-W12
**Team**: Development Team Alpha

---

## Sprint Timeline

| Milestone | Time (CST) |
|-----------|------------|
| Sprint Start | 2026-03-16T09:00:00+08:00 |
| Sprint End | 2026-03-20T18:00:00+08:00 |
| Review Meeting | 2026-03-20T14:00:00+08:00 |

---

## Completed Work

### Key Deliverables

- API v2.3.0 deployment completed and verified in production
- Authentication module refactoring finished
- Database migration scripts tested and deployed
- Weekly standup process standardized with normalized time tracking

### Tasks Summary

- **Total tasks completed**: 12
- **Daily breakdown**:
  - Monday (2026-03-16): 2 tasks
  - Tuesday (2026-03-17): 3 tasks
  - Wednesday (2026-03-18): 4 tasks
  - Thursday (2026-03-19): 3 tasks
  - Friday (2026-03-20): 0 tasks (review day)

---

## Blockers & Risks

- Day 3 standup delayed by 1 minute (09:31) due to technical issues — resolved
- No critical blockers encountered during the sprint
- All deliverables completed on schedule

---

## Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Velocity | 3 tasks/day |
| Team capacity | 5 person-days |
| Sprint goals achieved | 100% |
| Average standup time | 09:29:48 |

---

## Next Steps

- **Sprint 8 kickoff**: 2026-03-23T09:00:00+08:00
- **Carryover items**: None — all Sprint 7 items completed
- **Action items**:
  - [ ] Distribute review notes to stakeholders
  - [ ] Update Sprint 8 backlog based on feedback
  - [ ] Schedule retrospective meeting

---

## Notes

Sprint 7 has been completed successfully with all deliverables on time. The team maintained consistent standup attendance with normalized time tracking now in place. API v2.3.0 is stable in production with no reported issues.

---

**Document generated**: 2026-03-20T10:00:00+08:00
**Review meeting**: 2026-03-20T14:00:00+08:00
